publishedAbstract: Heketi pod fails to start up after shutdown or crash. Below errors are observed. ~~~ /src/github.com/heketi/heketi/apps/glusterfs/dbcommon.go：121: failed to upgrade db for brick entries ：id not found。 /src/github.com/heketi/heketi/apps/glusterfs/app.go：131: unable to upgrade changes。 /src/github.com/heketi/heketi/apps/glusterfs/app.go：139: id not found ~~~
publishedTitle: Heketi pod fails to start if heketidb is inconsistent
